tasks.subject: Task 0: Preparation — audit current v0.3.4 state
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm v0.3.4 save routing is functional before we touch anything.

**Files:** None (read-only audit).

**Verify:** Summon a beast with Summoner, conjure a Familiar, trigger save routing from a chat card — all work as v0.3.4.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual: confirm v0.3.4 working via Summoner + Familiar smoke tests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Save routing functional", "Summon tab renders", "Familiar ritual works", "git clean on main"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Companion source registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create pure-data constant defining all companion sources (badge color, controller type, skill, termination rules).

**Files:** Create `scripts/companion/companion-sources.mjs`.

**Verify:** Import in Foundry console, check `Object.keys(COMPANION_SOURCES)` and `getSourceMeta('summoner').label`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/companion/companion-sources.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: import module, check Object.keys(COMPANION_SOURCES) and getSourceMeta('summoner').label", "acceptanceCriteria": ["9 sources + legacy fallback", "getSourceMeta works", "No external imports"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Shared CreaturePicker dialog
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extract inline picker code (summoner/familiar) into a reusable ApplicationV2 dialog.

**Files:** Create `scripts/companion/creature-picker.mjs`, `templates/creature-picker.hbs`.

**Verify:** Call `CreaturePicker.pick({filter: {types: ['beast'], maxHD: 2}})` from console.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/companion/creature-picker.mjs", "templates/creature-picker.hbs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: call CreaturePicker.pick({...}) from console, confirm dialog + resolution", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Returns uuid or null", "Filter config works", "Search filters rows live", "ApplicationV2 pattern"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: CompanionSpawner engine
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Unified spawn/dismiss/query engine consolidating placeToken + updateActorFlags + combat-add.

**Files:** Create `scripts/companion/companion-spawner.mjs`.

**Verify:** Spawn → query → dismiss cycle via console on a real beast UUID.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/companion/companion-spawner.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: spawn+query+dismiss cycle via console", "acceptanceCriteria": ["spawn returns tokenId + actorId", "flags written atomically", "getCompanionsFor scans tokens + world", "dismiss removes token + clears flags", "multi-companion replace prompt"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Companion termination manager
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Auto-dismiss on zeroHP trigger. Stub duration/manaLapse/shift for Phase 2.

**Files:** Create `scripts/companion/companion-termination.mjs`.

**Verify:** Spawn companion, set HP to 0 via update — auto-dismiss fires.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/companion/companion-termination.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: set companion HP to 0, confirm auto-dismiss fires", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zeroHP triggers dismiss", "GM-only listener", "Other triggers stubbed"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: CompanionManager tab renderer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Inline-HTML tab renderer that lists all flagged companions per PC. NPC vs character action list branches.

**Files:** Create `scripts/companion/companion-manager-tab.mjs`.

**Verify:** Open PC sheet with active companion → Companions tab → card renders → dismiss works.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/companion/companion-manager-tab.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: open PC sheet with companion, click Companions tab, confirm card renders + dismiss works", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tab injected into sheet", "NPC vs character action list branches correctly", "Save buttons route through controller", "Dismiss removes card"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: CSS styling for companion cards
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CSS for `.vce-companion-card`, type badges, save buttons, HP gradient, empty state.

**Files:** Modify `styles/vagabond-character-enhancer.css`.

**Verify:** Open Companions tab — visual inspection matches spec section 3.3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["styles/vagabond-character-enhancer.css"], "verifyCommand": "manual: open Companions tab and visually compare to spec mockup", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Card layout matches spec", "HP gradient works", "Type badges visible", "Reuses existing tokens"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Register tab + termination + remove old Summon injection
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire up tab renderer + termination manager; disable `_injectSummonTab` in summoner.mjs.

**Files:** Modify `scripts/vagabond-character-enhancer.mjs`, `scripts/class-features/summoner.mjs`.

**Verify:** Reload world, PC sheet shows 'Companions' tab (not 'Summon').

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/vagabond-character-enhancer.mjs", "scripts/class-features/summoner.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: reload world, confirm Companions tab replaces Summon tab", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tab renamed", "No double injection", "No console errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Refactor Summoner to use CompanionSpawner
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace inline placeToken + flag block with `CompanionSpawner.spawn({sourceId: 'summoner', ...})`. Keep activeConjure write. Guard legacy auto-banish hook.

**Files:** Modify `scripts/class-features/summoner.mjs`.

**Verify:** Summon a beast → Companions tab card with SUMMON badge → click action rolls via Mysticism.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/class-features/summoner.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: summon a beast → Companions tab card with SUMMON badge → click action rolls via Mysticism", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Uses CompanionSpawner.spawn", "activeConjure flag preserved", "Focus + Second Nature unchanged", "Legacy auto-banish hook guarded", "Smoke test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Refactor Familiar to use CompanionSpawner
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace inline placeToken + flag block with `CompanionSpawner.spawn({sourceId: 'familiar', ...})`. Keep activeFamiliar write. Guard existing 0-HP hook.

**Files:** Modify `scripts/perk-features/familiar.mjs`.

**Verify:** Conjure familiar → Companions tab FAMILIAR card → dismiss works → ritual recast replaces.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["scripts/perk-features/familiar.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "manual: conjure familiar → Companions tab FAMILIAR card → dismiss works → ritual recast replaces", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Uses CompanionSpawner.spawn", "activeFamiliar flag preserved", "Ritual check enforced", "No double-dismiss"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: End-to-end smoke test matrix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Walk 16 scenarios covering all Phase 1 behaviors + v0.3.4 regressions.

**Files:** None (verification only).

**Verify:** All 16 scenarios pass without console errors.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "manual: walk all 16 scenarios above", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All 16 scenarios pass", "No console errors", "No regressions from v0.3.4"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: CHANGELOG + version bump + release
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document v0.4.0, bump version 0.3.4→0.4.0, tag and release.

**Files:** Modify `CHANGELOG.md`, `module.json`.

**Verify:** `git diff HEAD~1 module.json CHANGELOG.md` shows expected changes; `v0.4.0` tag applied.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CHANGELOG.md", "module.json"], "verifyCommand": "git diff module.json CHANGELOG.md && git tag --list | grep v0.4.0", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Changelog entry", "Version bumped", "Tag applied", "Pushed to remote"]}
```
